violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Hard boiled eggs and milk at buffet station were observed held at 62-64 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC informed of ensuring refrigerant filled food storing vessels are thoroughly chilled prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Laminate lined shelving and cabinets in kitchen were observed in poor repair (composite wood exposed in various areas). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Facility does not have a method to easily provide ingredients for self-service bakery items to consumer. A list of ingredients to be available for all bakery items upon consumer request. Inspector also discussed food must be labeled with the common name of the food and major allergen/s associated with food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Laminate lined shelving and cabinets in kitchen were observed in poor repair (composite wood exposed in various areas). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
